class.name: CassieSurface
class.brief_description: Generates an [ArrayMesh] from one or more closed boundary curves.
class.description:
Accepts [CassiePath3D] boundary paths and runs the full CASSIE surface-generation pipeline: optional Taubin beautification, uniform resampling, DMWT optimal triangulation, and pmp uniform remeshing.
[codeblock] var surface := CassieSurface.new() surface.target_edge_length = 0.05 surface.target_boundary_points = 40
surface.add_boundary_path(outer_loop) var mesh: ArrayMesh = surface.generate_surface() if mesh: $MeshInstance3D.mesh = mesh [/codeblock]
[method generate_surface] caches its result; call it once and retrieve it later with [method get_generated_mesh]. Call [method clear_generated_mesh] to force a re-run.

method.name: add_boundary_path
method.description: Adds [param path] to the list of boundary curves. The first path added is treated as the outer boundary. Currently only single-boundary surfaces are fully supported.

method.name: clear_boundary_paths
method.description: Removes all boundary paths. Does not clear the cached mesh.

method.name: clear_generated_mesh
method.description: Discards the cached mesh so the next call to [method generate_surface] re-runs the full pipeline.

method.name: generate_surface
method.description:
Runs the surface generation pipeline and returns the resulting [ArrayMesh], or [code]null[/code] if no boundary paths have been added or triangulation fails.
If [member auto_beautify] is [code]true[/code], each path is smoothed with Taubin λ/μ before triangulation using [member beautify_lambda], [member beautify_mu], and [member beautify_iterations].
If [member auto_resample] is [code]true[/code], each path is resampled to [member target_boundary_points] points before triangulation.
The result is cached; subsequent calls return the cached mesh without re-running the pipeline.

method.name: get_boundary_path
method.description: Returns the boundary path at [param index].

method.name: get_boundary_path_count
method.description: Returns the number of boundary paths added.

method.name: get_generated_mesh
method.description: Returns the cached mesh from the last [method generate_surface] call, or [code]null[/code] if the surface has not been generated yet.

members.member: When [code]true[/code], [method generate_surface] runs Taubin smoothing on each boundary path before triangulating. Controlled by [member beautify_lambda], [member beautify_mu], and [member beautify_iterations].
When [code]true[/code], [method generate_surface] resamples each boundary path to [member target_boundary_points] points before triangulating.
Number of Taubin smoothing passes applied when [member auto_beautify] is [code]true[/code].
Forward step size for Taubin smoothing. See [method CassiePath3D.beautify_taubin].
Backward step size for Taubin smoothing. Must be negative. See [method CassiePath3D.beautify_taubin].
Maximum Delaunay edge-flip iterations passed to the intrinsic remeshing stage. Only used when [member use_intrinsic_remeshing] is [code]true[/code].
Laplacian smoothing passes applied to the output mesh by the intrinsic remesher. Only used when [member use_intrinsic_remeshing] is [code]true[/code].
Target point count each boundary path is resampled to when [member auto_resample] is [code]true[/code]. Higher values produce finer boundary resolution and more triangles.
Target edge length passed to the pmp remesher. A value of [code]-1.0[/code] lets the remesher choose a length based on the input boundary size.
When [code]true[/code], an [IntrinsicTriangulation] pass runs after the initial triangulation to improve mesh quality by flipping edges toward Delaunay and applying Laplacian smoothing.
